title: Monitoring Dashboard Script
description: Create scripts/monitor_dashboard.py that parses existing JSONL event_log and request_trace files. Produces health summary with unified alert thresholds.
acceptance_criteria: scripts/monitor_dashboard.py --date today produces formatted health summary
Sections: chat metrics, mode distribution, evidence gate metrics, retrieval metrics, alerts
Unified alert thresholds: error_rate 2%, gate_trigger WARNING 30%/CRITICAL 40%, P95 15s
Malformed JSONL lines skipped with warning (not crash)
Old traces without evidence_gate fields handled gracefully
Only Python stdlib, no external dependencies
implementation_steps: 0. MANDATORY READS: Read files listed in agents_compliance.mandatory_reads
2. Implement chat metrics extraction (success rate, latency)
4. Implement evidence gate metrics (trigger rate, score distribution)
5. Implement retrieval metrics (top1 score, supplemental rate)
6. Implement unified alert thresholds per EP-005
9. /review: Review all changes before marking complete

agents_compliance.reason: Single new script file, no existing files modified, no schema/API/retrieval changes. Meets Lite Mode conditions.
